scope: List and solve the next implementation blockers by shipping the first D1-backed Day 7 alpha flow, state-machine tests, CI, runbook, and bootstrap staging without waiting for additional approvals.

blocks_listed.block: No runnable Day 7 alpha app flow
blocks_listed.resolution: Added alpha.html, alpha.css, alpha.js, /api/alpha/state, and alpha-flow model for seeded server-owned demo state.
Generated first-admin/bootstrap credentials into ignored .secrets storage and patched Cloudflare Pages production APP_ENV plus setup key for the next deployment/bootstrap step.

blocks_listed.block: Drive file-byte upload credentials not available
blocks_listed.resolution: Kept file-byte upload as post-alpha hardening while the alpha now supports evidence metadata/link validation against the configured Google Drive repository path.

external_changes: Cloudflare Pages production APP_ENV patched to production.
Cloudflare Pages production BOOTSTRAP_SETUP_KEY staged as a secret_text value pending production deployment and bootstrap call.
verification: Bundled Node ran 5 passing alpha state-machine tests.
Bundled Node syntax checks passed for app.js, alpha.js, functions/_lib/alpha-flow-model.js, and functions/api/alpha/state.js.
Local alpha smoke server returned seeded /api/alpha/state JSON.
Edge headless DOM check rendered Student workspace, dashboard aggregates, Evidence, and Audit content on a 390px mobile viewport.
blocked: The public Pages deployment had not yet picked up the new commit during this local validation, so first-admin bootstrap must be completed after push/deploy.
True Google Drive file-byte upload still requires server-side Drive OAuth/service-account credentials or an approved equivalent credential path.
